nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 65. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 5pm. Sunny, with a high near 91. Southwest wind 7 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 70. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers between 1pm and 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. West wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 55. Northwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Thursday
